ab: maha su nanu mwah?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: mhkangi cu mwah.
en: I came on foot.

ab: mglux su toruy nanu mwah?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: glux cu basu mwah.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: pkusa su nanu musa kyokay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: pnganun cu toruy ni yaba mu musa.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: maha nanu musa pqwasan biru krryax hiya?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: qmet zitensya musa pqwasan biru hiya.
en: B: He rode his bicycle to school.

ab: maha nanu musa mes ramat qa yaki su?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: qmet otobay musa mes ramat qa hiya.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: maha su nanu musa Giran?
en: A: How are you going to get to Yilan?

ab: pglux cu basu musa Giran.
en: B: I want to take a bus to Yilan.

ab: maha nanu musa Gipun hiya?
en: A: Why is he going to Japan?

ab: pglux xikoki musa Gipun hiya.
en: B: He took a plane to Japan.

ab: pglux toruy nanu musa Takaw hiya?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: pglux kisya musa Takaw hiya.
en: B: He took a train to Kaohsiung.

ab: pglux kisya musa Heto hiya ga?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: uya, pglux kisya musa Heto hiya.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: pglux kisya musa Heto hiya ga?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: iyat, pglux xikoki musa Tayto hiya.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: maki eki basu bih cqani?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: maki, musa su lasu cikay lga si ktli qa aki basu la.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: minas sobih na eki kisya cqani ga, cyan maki inu?
ch: A:離這裡最近的火車站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest train station to here?

ab: uka aki kisya cqani, haya nanak hlgun su la.
ch: B:這裡沒有火車站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no train station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: glux basu ga knwan ptehok ta pqwasan biru?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: mpux magan pung baq tehok pqwasan biru.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: glux kisya ga, akya knwan ptehok ta Taycyu?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: qutux tmucing lga baq tehok Taycyu.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: qmuyut ta toruy musa Ulay ga baq bsyaq?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: akya qutux tmucing baq tehoq.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: glux su basu mwah muyax mu ga akya ktwa ryax?
ch: A:你搭公車來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to take the bus to my house?

ab: aki cqa mpusan pung.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: baq su qmet zitensya ga?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: baq cu qmet zitensya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: maki otobay su ga?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: maki qutux otobay mu.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: maki otobay su ga?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: uka otobay mu.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
